webApp.description: Interactive demo showcasing all UI controls rendered by the GenUI component library.
features: Live preview of 60+ UI component types

home.name: How to Explore UI Components with GenUI Demo
home.description: Browse and interact with all available GenUI UI components organized by category.

steps.name: Choose a Category
steps.text: Select a category from the sidebar such as Actions, Text Inputs, Controls, Collections, Display, or Spacing to see related components.

steps.name: Interact with Components
steps.text: Click buttons, fill inputs, toggle switches, and interact with each component to see how it behaves.

steps.name: Review the Action Log
steps.text: Check the action log at the bottom of the screen to see events fired by each component interaction.
